title: B98 9HL, Kaug Refinery Services Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/BP3421SC/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Kaug Refinery Services Limited   Installation name: Kaug Refinery Services   Permit number: EPR/BP3421SC   "
